name: Rabbit
tagline: AI hardware device promising to replace smartphone apps with a Large Action Model
description: Rabbit sold 100,000 R1 devices but saw a 95% abandonment rate within months. By late 2025, employees hadn't been paid for months and were on strike, though the company has not officially shut down.

sources.title: What's next for Rabbit? Employees say they haven't been paid for months while company teases new AI hardware
The rise and fall of Rabbit R1
